SAU_communism_DEF.value: Democratic People's Republic of Saudi Arabia

FACTION_CREATED_UNDER_MASTER_MESSAGE.value: We have joined $FACTION|H$ faction together under our master

SPC_international_bureau_of_revolutionar.value: International Bureau of Revolutionary Socialist Unity

has_baltic_capital_state_tt.value: Capital State is within the Baltics

has_balkan_capital_state_tt.value: Countries with Capital State in the Balkans

war_declaration_generated_tension_25.value: Target Country has generated at least 25% World Tension

faction_rule_modifier_encourage_take_sta.value: §G10%§! cost reduction for the §YTake States§! Peace Action\n§R5%§! cost increase for the §YLiberate§! Peace Action

faction_rule_modifier_encourage_chinese_.value: §G5%§! cost reduction for the §YTake States§! and §YPuppet§! Peace Actions on Chinese core states

SET_FACTION_MEMBER_UPGRADE_MIN.value: Set $UPGRADENAME|H$ to be at least: $MIN|%H$ for $FACTION|H$

ADD_FACTION_INFLUENCE_EFFECT_NO_FACTION.value: Add $VAL$ §YFaction Influence§! when in faction to $COUNTRY|H$

FACTION_ADD_EXTRA_GOAL_SLOT_NO_FACTION.value: Add $VAL|+0$ $CATEGORY|H$ goal slot to your faction

TRIGGER_HAS_MANPOWER_TO_BECOME_LEADER.value: $COUNTRY|H$ exceeds the current faction leader and its subjects in deployed manpower. $MISSING_EXPL$

TRIGGER_HAS_NOT_MANPOWER_TO_BECOME_LEADE.value: $COUNTRY|H$ doesn't exceed the current faction leader and its subjects in deployed manpower. $MISSING_EXPL$

TRIGGER_HAS_INFLUENCE_TO_BECOME_LEADER.value: $COUNTRY|H$ has more faction influence than the faction leader. $MISSING_EXPL$

TRIGGER_HAS_NOT_INFLUENCE_TO_BECOME_LEAD.value: $COUNTRY|H$ doesn't have more faction influence than the faction leader. $MISSING_EXPL$

TRIGGER_HAS_INDUSTRY_TO_BECOME_LEADER.value: $COUNTRY|H$ exceeds the faction leader in number of factories. $MISSING_EXPL$

TRIGGER_HAS_NOT_INDUSTRY_TO_BECOME_LEADE.value: $COUNTRY|H$ doesn't exceed the faction leader in number of factories. $MISSING_EXPL$

TRIGGER_HAS_NOT_FACTION_TAB_UNLOCKED.value: Does not have $TAB|H$ unlocked in their faction

TRIGGER_HAS_POLITICAL_SUPPORT.value: $COUNTRY|H$ has the same $IDEOLOGY|H$ ideology as the leader.

TRIGGER_HAS_NOT_POLITICAL_SUPPORT.value: $COUNTRY|H$ doesn't have the same $IDEOLOGY|H$ ideology as the leader.

FACTION_MANIFEST_FULFILLMENT_LESS_THAN.value: Faction manifest fulfillment is less than $VALUE|%0H$

FACTION_MANIFEST_FULFILLMENT_MORE_THAN.value: Faction manifest fulfillment is greater than $VALUE|%0H$

FACTION_GOAL_FULFILLMENT_NOT_IN_RANGE.value: $GOAL|H$ fulfillment is less than $MIN|%0H$ or greater than $MAX|%0H$

FACTION_POWER_PROJECTION_LESS_THAN.value: Faction power projection is less than $VALUE|H$

FACTION_POWER_PROJECTION_MORE_THAN.value: Faction power projection is greater than $VALUE|H$

FACTION_INFLUENCE_RANK_LESS_THAN.value: Faction influence rank is less than $VALUE|H0$

FACTION_INFLUENCE_RANK_MORE_THAN.value: Faction influence rank is greater than $VALUE|H0$

contribution_rule.value: What contribution limits should we set?

call_to_war_rules.value: Who can call members to war?

peace_conference_rules.value: How should we act in Peace Conferences?

dismissal_rules.value: Who can be removed from the faction?

GLOBAL_RESOURCE_EXTRACTED_TOTAL_DESC.value: Total amount of resources extracted globally

FACTION_RESOURCE_EXTRACTED_TOTAL_DESC.value: Total amount of resources extracted by faction members

defense_of_democracy_goal_desc.value: Democracy is under threat. We must work together to ensure that the democratic countries in the world do not fall one by one.

containment_of_communism_goal_desc.value: The world cannot be safe until the Communist threat is put down.

suppress_regional_fascism_goal_desc.value: Fascism is threatening to spread like a wildfire. The more countries that falls to its claws, the more dangerous the situation around us will become.

suppress_regional_communism_goal_desc.value: We must do whatever it takes to keep as much of [ROOT.GetCountryContinent] free from the communist yoke.

regional_expansionism_goal_desc.value: Our Faction should take the lead and dominate in [ROOT.GetCountryContinent]

suppress_regional_democracy_goal_desc.value: The so-called democratic countries are the biggest threat to our ideals. We need to ensure that they are only in control of a minority of [ROOT.GetCountryContinent].

between_the_seas_goal_desc.value: By creating a solid wall of allied territory, from the Black sea to the Baltic, we can withstand any potential threat.

little_entente_goal_desc.value: The Paris Peace Treaties stipulated the borders of [GER.GetName], [HUN.GetName], [BUL.GetName], and [AUS.GetName]. Our main aim is to ensure that these countries do not start annexing border territories, and once again destroy the peace in Europe.

china_territorial_integrity_goal_desc.value: China should be liberated and united under one ruling party. Only by regaining control of our territories from external and internal enemies, can we can restore China to glory.

china_wang_front_expansion_desc.value: It is time to counter the colonialist powers' influence over East Asia. We need to build our own power block in the region, so that we will never again be dominated.

strength_in_unity_goal_desc.value: Countries in our corner of the world should stand together. By building a strong faction, we have the best chances possible of remaining independent and neutral.

conquest_of_territory_goal_desc.value: In a hostile world, expansion is vital to survival. Expansion creates buffer zones and gives us access to more resources.

spread_of_communism_goal_desc.value: The time has come for the masses to rise. And where the masses aren't able to rise, we must help them by force of arms.

control_of_the_balkans_goal_desc.value: External Powers have always tried to spread their influence to the Balkans. We need to ensure that we stand strong together, and counter any foreign incursions into the region.

african_decolonization_goal_desc.value: The time for Africa to stand up against its adversaries and oppressors has come. We must free the continent, by force if necessary!

habsburg_hegemony_goal_desc.value: The family is the most important part of any union, and our alliance is no different. We must secure the crowns of Europe, and spread our influence throughout.

indifference_is_a_threat_goal_desc.value: With a major conflict almost inevitable in Europe, we must ensure that there are no surprises. Any country refusing to take a side must be removed.

security_through_expansion_goal_desc.value: We need to create a shield around our territory and secure a ring of states around our current borders.

an_iron_curtain_goal_name_desc.value: In order to better protect the motherland, we must create a curtain of puppet states around us to keep any unwanted visitors out.

eastern_european_security_goal_desc.value: In order to better protect our interests in Eastern Europe, we must step in and set up like-minded regimes to our west.

mare_nostrum_goal_desc.value: It has always been the dream of our people to turn the Mediterranean into our own inland sea. The time has come to make that dream a reality!

pax_romana_goal_desc.value: It has always been the dream of our people to restore the glory of the Roman Empire. The time has come to make that dream a reality!

building_up_guam_goal_desc.value: We need to secure the connection to [PHI.GetNameDef], in case of a conflict with [JAP.GetName]. Additionally, it would be very advantageous to have a closer staging point for our navies, should we ever go to war with the [JAP.GetAdjective]. [638.GetName] fits the bill perfectly.

the_two_seas_goal_name.value: Establish Baltic and Black Sea Presence

the_two_seas_goal_desc.value: We should ensure we have a strong naval presence in the Baltic Sea as well as in the Black Sea.

one_germany_goal_desc.value: In order to build a strong and united power base, we first must ensure that Germany is strong and united. The Paris Peace treaties forbade any German Reunification. Now is the time to prove that we are not bound by useless treaties.

guardians_of_peace_goal_desc.value: Storm clouds are building on the horizon. We need to guard against war breaking out too early, so that our alliance has time to properly prepare for the inevitable conflict.

growing_the_faction_desc.value: Our faction must have more members if it is to be taken seriously on the geopolitical stage.

a_large_faction_goal_name.value: Invite More Countries to our Faction

a_large_faction_goal_desc.value: By growing even larger our faction will be able to project its influence even further.

preemptive_strike_on_fascism_goal_name.value: Launch a Pre-emptive Strike on a Fascist Country

preemptive_strike_on_fascism_goal_desc.value: We shouldn't wait for them to hit us. We need to ensure that we have the initiative.

a_great_fortress_goal_desc.value: Preparedness is the key. By securing the border regions, and key points, using the most modern of fortifications, we can ensure that the enemy can't defeat us.

aggressive_defense_goal_desc.value: We shall not yield one inch to the enemy. Our soldiers must be instilled with the understanding that the key is not to die for our country, but to make the enemy die for theirs.

war_on_communism_goal_desc.value: We need to stop the spread of communism by any means necessary.

war_on_democracy_goal_desc.value: We need to strike against our ideological enemies.

defeat_of_communism_goal_desc.value: To defeat world communism we need to start at home by eradicating communism in our part of the world.

defeat_of_fascism_goal_desc.value: To stop the spread of fascism once and for all, we need to start at home by eradicating fascism in our part of the world.

defeat_of_anti_communists_goal_desc.value: The first step towards a world revolution is the successful conversion of regional powers that oppose this. Thus we need to remove any threats on our own continent first and foremost.

defeat_of_anti_fascists_goal_desc.value: We must aim to destroy the anti-fascist governments on our continent.

defeating_our_enemies_goal_desc.value: The times are uncertain and war is inevitable. We must ensure that however that war comes, we end up on the winning side.

is_victor_in_pc_tt.value: Is on the winning side in a peace conference

a_military_base_goal_desc.value: The crusade against communism requires guns. In order to produce guns in large quantities we need a strong military industry.

resource_control_goal_desc.value: The faction needs to ensure it has the resources it needs to take on any threat in the world

secure_european_continent_goal_desc.value: We must ensure that the European Continent is aligned with our cause. The [faction.GetName] should rule supreme in Europe.

secure_north_africa_goal_desc.value: We should strive to dominate not only Europe, but also ensure that we can get more than just a foothold in North Africa.

an_armored_fist_goal_desc.value: New times create opportunities for new warfare. Tanks are the future. We need to ensure that we, as a faction, have enough to dominate the battlefield.

an_infantry_army_goal_desc.value: The backbone of any army is its infantry. We need a sizeable infantry army to back up our claims on both the diplomatic arena, and in the field.

high_seas_fleet_goal_desc.value: Ensuring our enemies do not have control over the North Atlantic is vital to our operations. If we can disrupt that it both means we won't suffer the effects of a Naval blockade, and that our fleets can roam freely.

control_the_chinese_coast_goal_desc.value: If attacked, we should strive to maintain access to the sea for as long as possible. Our survival is linked to our ability to receive goods from countries across the sea.

guerilla_expansion_goal_desc.value: We may not be able to contest the invaders on their own terms, so we shall contest them on our terms.

industrial_expansion_goal_desc.value: The best way to create a strong faction is to have a strong industrial base. We need to ensure that we have the industrial strength needed to become an important power.

industrial_domination_goal_desc.value: Modern warfare is all about production capabilities. Let us ensure that we have the largest industrial capability the world has seen.

industrial_research_goal_desc.value: In order to become a dominant player, we need to ensure that we have the industrial know-how across the faction.

secure_chinese_waters_goal_desc.value: We can dominate on land, but with a long coastline making sure that no one can invade us should be of highest priority. This safety starts far out at sea.

faction_goal_subjugate_the_faction_desc.value: The only way that we will be able to resist the onslaught of the foreign invaders is if we present a unified front with strong leadership. From many different voices a great choir shall sound.

faction_goal_north_subjugated_desc.value: If we were to make a concerted effort in integrating this part of our faction the rest of the warlords would understand which way the wind blows and get in line.

faction_goal_west_subjugated_desc.value: If we were to make a concerted effort in integrating this part of our faction the rest of the warlords would understand which way the wind blows and get in line.

faction_goal_south_subjugated_desc.value: If we were to make a concerted effort in integrating this part of our faction the rest of the warlords would understand which way the wind blows and get in line.

faction_goal_no_japanese_in_china_desc.value: For too long have the Japanese oppressed our people. They can no longer be allowed to stay in China.

faction_goal_the_northern_mandate_desc.value: If our people shall be able to prosper we will need the territory and resources that can be found in the Siberia. The current control isn't able to utilise it properly so we do have a right to it.

faction_goal_the_southern_mandate_desc.value: In a glorious past we excerted influence in the areas to our south and we shall do it yet again. With the wealth that can be found in the area there is no end to what we could do.

faction_goal_the_greater_game_desc.value: Empires sought to impose their will on Central Asia and were repelled. Our hour has come to advance westward and across the steppes again.

suppress_asian_communism_goal_desc.value: Communism is a threat to traditional ways of life, to the natural order of things. We must unite to defeat communism wherever it shows its ugly head

strategic_resource_control_goal_desc.value: The one who controls the strategic resources of the world controls the politics of the world.

align_china_goal_desc.value: The Chinese factions and the threat they represent need to be brought under control. The best solution to this problem is to replace them with a friendly minded regime.

control_the_chinese_capitals_goal_desc.value: If we gain control of the historical capitals of China, the resistance to our plans will surely lessen.

war_on_communism_in_asia_goal_name.value: Declare war on Communism in Asia

war_on_communism_in_asia_goal_desc.value: There is only one way to truly defeat communism; by force of arms. We need to root out communism in all of Asia if we are to ever be safe from its influence.

coastal_security_goal_desc.value: We should ensure that we have total control of the entire sea front of East and South East Asia. That way we can ensure that the western imperialist colonizers can't maintain a foothold in our region.

secure_the_oil_supply_goal_desc.value: If we are to fight a long war we need to secure enough oil to sustain it by any means necessary.

secure_the_oil_supply_tech_bonus.value: Secure the Oil Supply Goal Bonus

protector_of_peace_goal_desc.value: Ours is not to get involved in wars in Europe or elsewhere. Instead we should strive to maintain peace, and encourage other countries to settle their disputes peacefully and quickly.

african_domination_goal_desc.value: Our ultimate aim must always be to ensure no foreign influence in Africa. Those that are not with us are against us and need to be made compliant.

contain_japanese_expansion_asia_goal_des.value: We must do what we can to contain the territorial expansion of [JAP.GetName]

pan_americanism_goal_desc.value: The entire Americas should be united. By getting everyone onboard, we can secure our part of the world, and create one united front against any outside forces.

amerindian_liberation_goal_desc.value: The original people of the Americas must be liberated from the foreign oppressors currently ruing over them.

islamic_brotherhood_goal_desc.value: The Islamic nations of the world need to unite in order to stand up against those who would rather see us conquered and subjugated.

baltic_security_goal_desc.value: In order to secure the futures of our citizens and civilians, we must protects the Baltic region with all we have. Only by keeping it under our control, will its people be able to prosper.

nordic_defence_goal_desc.value: In order to secure the futures of our citizens and civilians, we must protect the Nordic region with all we have. Only by keeping the imposing empires out, will we be able to thrive.

european_dominance_goal_desc.value: If we can unite the majority of Europe under one banner, we can create an alliance that is strong enough to face even the gravest of threats.

asian_dominance_goal_desc.value: With the majority of Asia under our control, our faction will be a force to be reckoned with.

middle_east_dominance_goal_desc.value: From the Arabian peninsula and the Levant to the Afghan mountains, we need to unite and establish total control. This region could be a major player if we can just ensure that all are working together.

the_arteries_of_trade_goal_desc.value: The main shipping lines need to be put under our control in order to ensure the survival of our member countries.

the_atomic_race_goal_desc.value: We need to ensure that our enemies, current or future, do not gain access to nuclear weapons before we do. Only by being the first we can be sure that no other power can stand against us.

the_atomic_race_complete_trigger.value: A member of [ROOT.GetFactionName] is the first country to finish $sp_nuclear_bomb$

the_atomic_race_complete_trigger_fail.value: A country that is not a member of [ROOT.GetFactionName] is the first country to finish $sp_nuclear_bomb$

rule_the_waves_goal_desc.value: To truly dominate the ocean a grand fleet is needed, and the key component of a grand fleet are the Capital Ships.

eliminate_the_twin_threats_goal_desc.value: As long as [SOV.GetNameDef] and [GER.GetNameDef] are not brought into line, we can never be safe.

disarm_aggression_central_powers_goal_de.value: Democracies rarely attack other countries. In order to secure Europe for future generation, we must ensure that these aggressive countries are either turned into democracies, or have them removed completely.

imperial_glory_goal_desc.value: The key bastions of our empire, and those of our allies, need to hold. By keeping control of possessions all across the globe in times of war, we can show the world that we remain a force to be reckoned with.

production_quotas_goal_desc.value: We need to have a huge arsenal of weapons to secure the integrity of the [ROOT.GetFactionName] and be prepared to face any threats that come our way.

stall_the_fascist_threat_goal_desc.value: We need to slow down the spread of fascism in the world. Spain is most likely going to fall, but we need to do our part to delay it until we are ready to defend ourselves against the rising threat of fascism. By tying down enemy troops in a conflict in Spain, we make it harder for them to focus elsewhere, thus buying ourselves valuable time.

the_red_tide_goal_desc.value: Boots on the ground is what matters the most. What is needed is a ten million strong army. That is how survival is truly secured.

military_infrastructure_goal_desc.value: A well-developed infrastructure is critical in ensuring our border-defense forces have the supplies lines they require.

ensure_military_r_d_goal_desc.value: We must ensure our military technology is up to par, by building facilities dedicated to the research and development of advanced prototypes and new concepts.

spy_master_goal_desc.value: We should specialize one of our members in the art of espionage and intelligence gathering, allowing them to oversee and direct our alliance's operations.

convoy_sufficiency_goal_desc.value: In order to have sufficient capacity to both supply our troops abroad and ensure the material needs of our industry are met with imports from overseas, we must create a sufficiently-large merchant marine.

develop_mexican_oil_goal_desc.value: Expanding extraction of Mexican oil reserves would ensure sufficient fuel supplies for industrial and military demands.

develop_curacao_oil_goal_desc.value: Curaçao’s refineries are integral to the processing of Venezuelan oil. Expanding extraction of them would maintain alliance access of refined petroleum products.

develop_venezuelan_oil_goal_desc.value: Venezuela’s petroleum extraction can be further expanded to furnish our alliance with the energy access it needs to support its military activities.

develop_guyanan_bauxite_goal_desc.value: Expanded development of Guyana’s bauxite deposits would provide the raw resources that are essential for large-scale aircraft manufacturing.

develop_suriname_bauxite_goal_desc.value: Expanded development of Suriname’s rich bauxite deposits would provide the raw materials required for our alliance's growing aircraft industry.

develop_lappland_metals_goal_desc.value: Expanding extraction of Lappland’s mineral wealth would strengthen the alliance’s supply of iron and tungsten, sustaining our arms manufacturing industry.

develop_ploiesti_oil_fields_goal_desc.value: As the only oil-fields in Europe, the Ploiești oil fields must be suitably exploited to ensure the alliance has the fuel required for continued military operations.

develop_baku_oil_fields_goal_desc.value: Developing the Baku oil region would provide extensive refined petroleum products vital to military operations.

develop_iraqi_oil_goal_desc.value: Expanding Iraq’s oil production capacity could be instrumental in satisfying our military's fuel needs.

develop_persian_oil_goal_desc.value: Expanding Persia’s oil fields and refining capacity would ensure a continuous flow of fuel for operational needs.

develop_chinese_metals_goal_desc.value: China’s wealth in various critical metals could be mined more extensively to furnish the alliance's military-industrial base with the resources it needs.

develop_malayan_riches_goal_desc.value: Development of Malaya’s tungsten and rubber resources would greatly bolster the alliance’s material base, ensuring key inputs for manufacturing and military logistics.

expand_newfoundland_bases_goal_desc.value: Expanding our bases in Newfoundland would allow us to better exercise control over North Atlantic convoys and project air and naval power across vital shipping routes.

expand_bermuda_bases_goal_desc.value: Expanding our bases in Bermuda would enable us to more effective patrol the mid-Atlantic, and maintain more secure supply lines between continents.

expand_bahamas_bases_goal_desc.value: Expanding our bases in the Bahamas would allow for more effective monitoring of Caribbean sea lanes and protection of maritime approaches into North and South America.

expand_iceland_bases_goal_desc.value: Expanding the bases in Iceland would allow us to better secure the Denmark Strait and exert more influence over the North Atlantic corridor.

expand_narvik_bases_goal_desc.value: Expanding the bases in Narvik would allow better maintenance of access to vital iron ore shipments and control over Arctic supply routes.

fortify_danish_belts_goal_desc.value: Fortifying the Kattegat would let us better exert sole control over naval access between the Baltic and North Seas.

fortify_danish_belts_tooltip.value: Every province in §YJylland§!, §YFyn§!, and §YSjaelland§! that controls the §YDanish Belts§! strait has a level 1 §YCoastal Fort§! and is manned by one division.

fortify_gibraltar_goal_desc.value: Fortifying our strategic base on the Gibraltar Strait would allow us to better exert control over the maritime movement between the Mediterranean and the Atlantic.

expand_maltese_bases_goal_desc.value: Expansion of our bases on Malta would enable better disruption of enemy supply lines and projection of power throughout the central Mediterranean.

expand_cretan_bases_goal_desc.value: Expansion of our bases on Crete would better allow us to exert dominance over the eastern Mediterranean and facilitate operations in the Aegean and North Africa.

expand_cypriot_bases_goal_desc.value: Expanding our bases on Cyprus would enable us to better support operations in the eastern Mediterranean and secure vital air routes to and from the Middle East.

fortify_bosporus_goal_desc.value: Fortifying the Bosporus Strait would ensure our control over all naval access between the Black Sea and the Mediterranean.

fortify_bosporus_tooltip.value: Every province in §YIstanbul§! that controls the §YBosporus§! strait has a level 1 §YCoastal Fort§!, a level 1 §YLand Fort§!, and is manned by one division.

fortify_dardanelles_goal_desc.value: Fortifying the Dardanelles would strengthen our ability to dictate fleet and trade movement from the Black Sea.

fortify_dardanelles_tooltip.value: Every province in §YEdirne§! and §YBursa§! that controls the §YDardanelles§! strait has a level 1 §YCoastal Fort§!, a level 1 §YLand Fort§!, and is manned by one division.

fortify_suez_canal_goal_desc.value: Continued possession of the Suez Canal is imperative to ensure our sole control over the main traffic artery between Europe and Asia.

fortify_suez_tooltip.value: Every province in §YSuez§! that controls the §YSuez§! strait has a level 1 §YCoastal Fort§!, a level 1 §YLand Fort§!, and is manned by one division.

fortify_strait_of_hormuz_goal_desc.value: Fortifying the strategic bases on the Strait of Hormuz would better enable us to exert control over access to vital Persian and Iraqi oil.

fortify_strait_of_hormuz_tooltip.value: Every province in §YMusandam§! and §YFars§! that controls the §YHormuz§! strait has a level 1 §YCoastal Fort§!, a level 1 §YLand Fort§!, and is manned by one division.

expand_ceylonese_bases_goal_desc.value: Expanding our bases on Ceylon would strengthen our domination over the Indian Ocean and facilitate protection of vital sea lanes between the Middle East and Southeast Asia.

expand_singapore_naval_base_goal_desc.value: The monumental fortified naval base of Singapore commands the Strait of Malacca and regulates movement between the Indian and Pacific Oceans. It should be strengthened even further.

fortify_manila_bay_goal_desc.value: Fortification of the defensible Manila Bay would improve our projection of power across the western Pacific and secure access to the East Indies and South China Sea.

fortify_manila_tooltip.value: §YManila§! province has a level 2 §YCoastal Fort§! and a level 7 §YNaval Base§!, and §YManila§! state has a level 8 §YAir Base§!.

fortify_okinawa_goal_desc.value: Fortifying Okinawa would command the approaches to the Japanese home islands and establish a strong defensive perimeter in the Pacific.

fortify_okinawa_tooltip.value: §YOkinawa§! has level 1 §YAnti-Air§! and a level 5 §YAir Base§!, and §YNaha§! province has a level 2 §YCoastal Fort§!.

fortify_iwo_jima_goal_desc.value: Fortifying Iwo Jima would command the approaches to the Japanese home islands and establish a strong defensive perimeter in the Pacific.

expand_caroline_islands_bases_goal_desc.value: Expansion of our bases in the Caroline Islands and the Truk Atoll would facilitate sustained naval and air campaigns across the central Pacific.

expand_guadalcanal_bases_goal_desc.value: Expanding our bases on Guadalcanal would better allow us to exercise control over naval operations in the South Pacific and the access routes from and to Australia.

expand_midway_island_bases_goal_desc.value: Development of our bases on Midway would ensure the security of the central Pacific approaches and provide a key base for transoceanic operations.

undoing_brest_litowsk_goal_desc.value: The disgraceful peace of Brest Litowsk was never fully undone. It is time to erase the last parts of this shameful part of our history.

marine_corps_goal_desc.value: Expanding our amphibious forces will greatly increase our offensive capabilities and the amount of enemy territory we can threaten.

airborne_corps_goal_desc.value: Expanding our airborne forces will greatly increase our offensive flexibility and allow us to strike deeper into enemy territory.

mountaineer_corps_goal_desc.value: Expanding our mountaineer forces will greatly increase our army's ability to contest this rugged and difficult terrain.

submarine_force_goal_desc.value: A suitable submarine force is critical in degrading enemy supply lines.

convoy_escort_force_goal_desc.value: To secure our supply lines we must ensure adequate numbers of escort vessels.

air_superiority_goal_desc.value: Control of the air dictates success on land and at sea. We must have sufficient fighter aircraft to secure our aerial dominance.

control_mexican_oil_goal_desc.value: Securing Mexican oil reserves would ensure sufficient fuel supplies for industrial and military demands.

control_curacao_oil_goal_desc.value: Curaçao’s refineries are integral to the processing of Venezuelan oil. Control over them would provide the alliance with reliable access to refined petroleum products.

control_venezuelan_oil_goal_desc.value: Venezuela’s large petroleum reserves would furnish our alliance with the energy access it needs to support its military activities.

control_guyanan_bauxite_goal_desc.value: Command over Guyana’s bauxite deposits would expand the alliance’s aluminum output, essential for aircraft manufacturing.

control_suriname_bauxite_goal_desc.value: Possession of Suriname’s rich bauxite deposits would provide the raw materials required for our alliance's growing aircraft industry.

control_lappland_metals_goal_desc.value: Access to Lappland’s mineral wealth would strengthen the alliance’s supply of iron and tungsten, sustaining our arms manufacturing industry.

control_ploiesti_oil_fields_goal_desc.value: As the only oil-fields in Europe, control of the Ploiești oil fields are invaluable in ensuring the alliance has the fuel required for continued military operations.

control_baku_oil_fields_goal_desc.value: Securing the Baku oil region would give access to extensive petroleum reserves vital to military operations.

control_iraqi_oil_goal_desc.value: Iraq’s oil production capacity could be instrumental in satisfying our military's fuel needs.

control_persian_oil_goal_desc.value: Control over Persia’s oil fields and refining capacity would ensure a continuous flow of fuel for operational needs.

control_chinese_metals_goal_desc.value: China’s wealth in various critical metals could supply the alliance's military-industrial base with the resources it needs.

control_malayan_riches_goal_desc.value: Control of Malaya’s tungsten and rubber resources would greatly bolster the alliance’s material base, ensuring key inputs for manufacturing and military logistics.

control_indonesian_riches_goal_desc.value: Indonesia’s diverse natural wealth, including oil, rubber, and minerals, are invaluable to support our industrial base and ensure the alliance's resource independence.

control_newfoundland_bases_goal_desc.value: Securing bases in Newfoundland would allow us to exercise control over North Atlantic convoys and project air and naval power across vital shipping routes.

control_bermuda_goal_desc.value: Bases in Bermuda would enable us to more effective patrol the mid-Atlantic, and maintain more secure supply lines between continents.

control_bahamas_bases_goal_desc.value: Possession of bases in the Bahamas would allow for more effective monitoring of Caribbean sea lanes and protection of maritime approaches into North and South America.

control_panama_canal_goal_desc.value: Control over the Panama Canal is vital for enabling the rapid redeployment of fleets between the Atlantic and Pacific, ensuring strategic flexibility across both oceans.

control_trinidad_goal_desc.value: Trinidad's key location makes it imperative for the control of Caribbean oil supplies and lets it serve as a strategic jumping-off-point on South America’s northern coast.

control_azores_goal_desc.value: The Azores' strategic location enables extended reach across the mid-Atlantic, closing the gap for both submarine and anti-submarine coverage, and ensuring continuous air cover for convoys.

control_iceland_goal_desc.value: Control of bases in Iceland would allow securing the Denmark Strait and exerting influence over the North Atlantic corridor.

control_faroe_islands_goal_desc.value: The Faroe Islands are located in a strategic location that enables control of northern sea routes and support for naval operations toward Britain, Scandinavia, and the Arctic.

control_narvik_goal_desc.value: Securing Narvik would allow maintenance of access to vital iron ore shipments and control over Arctic supply routes.

control_danish_belts_goal_desc.value: Garrisoning the Kattegat would let us exert sole control over naval access between the Baltic and North Seas.

control_brittany_bases_goal_desc.value: The strategic bases along Brittany’s coast would allow for wider-reaching submarine and air operations into the Atlantic, as well as securing access into the European mainland.

control_gibraltar_goal_desc.value: The strategic base on the Gibraltar Strait would allow us to exert control over the maritime movement between the Mediterranean and the Atlantic.

control_malta_goal_desc.value: Possession of Malta would enable disruption of enemy supply lines and projection of power throughout the central Mediterranean.

control_crete_goal_desc.value: Control over the island of Crete would allow dominance over the eastern Mediterranean and facilitate operations in the Aegean and North Africa.

control_cyprus_goal_desc.value: Control of Cyprus would enable support for operations in the eastern Mediterranean and secure vital air routes to and from the Middle East.

control_bosporus_goal_desc.value: Seizure of the Bosporus Strait would allow us to control all naval access between the Black Sea and the Mediterranean.

control_dardanelles_goal_desc.value: Holding the Dardanelles would make it possible to dictate fleet and trade movement from the Black Sea.

control_suez_canal_goal_desc.value: Possession of the vital Suez Canal would give us sole control over the main traffic artery between Europe and Asia, ensuring rapid transfer of forces and resources.

control_gulf_of_aden_bases_goal_desc.value: The strategic bases along the Gulf of Aden enable protection of the Red Sea approaches and secure shipping routes linking Europe, Africa, and Asia.

control_strait_of_hormuz_goal_desc.value: The strategic bases on the Strait of Hormuz would make it possible to exert control over access to vital Persian and Iraqi oil.

control_ceylon_goal_desc.value: Securing Ceylon would allow domination of the Indian Ocean and protection of vital sea lanes between the Middle East and Southeast Asia.

control_singapore_goal_desc.value: The monumental fortified naval base of Singapore commands the Strait of Malacca and regulates movement between the Indian and Pacific Oceans. It should be ours.

control_manila_goal_desc.value: Possession of the defensible Manila Bay would allow projection of power across the western Pacific and secure access to the East Indies and South China Sea.

control_okinawa_goal_desc.value: Control of Okinawa would make it possible to launch operations against the Japanese home islands and establish a strong defensive perimeter in the Pacific.

control_iwo_jima_goal_desc.value: Securing Iwo Jima would allow support for long-range air operations over Japan and expand our reach into the central Pacific.

control_caroline_islands_goal_desc.value: Dominance over the Caroline Islands and Truk Atoll would enable sustained naval and air campaigns across the central Pacific.

control_guadalcanal_goal_desc.value: Securing Guadalcanal would allow us to exercise control over naval operations in the South Pacific and the access routes from and to Australia.

control_wake_island_goal_desc.value: Holding Wake Island would make it possible to extend reconnaissance and air coverage across the central Pacific routes.

control_midway_island_goal_desc.value: Control of Midway would allow security of the central Pacific approaches and provide a key base for transoceanic operations.

control_hawaii_goal_desc.value: Seizing Pearl Harbor would make it possible to anchor Pacific operations and coordinate logistics across the entire oceanic theater, as well as opening up access to the American Pacific coastline.

control_attu_island_goal_desc.value: Securing Attu Island would allow exerting control over northern Pacific shipping lanes and enable operations along the Aleutian chain towards Alaska and the American Pacific coast.

undo_versailles_goal_desc.value: It is high time we undo the travesty of this 'Diktat'. We shall retake our rightful territory!

strategic_bombing_campaign_goal_desc.value: A large-scale strategic bombing campaign will systematically degrade the enemy's industrial capacity, allowing us to wear down their forces.

liberate_territory_goal_desc.value: The enemy is in possession of our territory. Liberating it should be our first goal.

great_offensive_goal_desc.value: A great offensive seizing enemy territory should be our first step towards the ultimate conclusion of the war.

FACTION_UPGRADE_INTELLIGENCE_BONUS_DESC.value: Through Faction §HIntelligence Sharing§! you complete §HAgency Upgrades§! $BONUS|H.0%$ quicker if another member of the faction has already unlocked that §HUpgrade§!.\n\nYour Faction can increase the §Hintelligence Sharing§! by holding §Hintelligence positions§! in your Faction.

FACTION_COMMANDER_DESC.value:
Theater Commanders transfer a share of the £doctrine_mastery §HMastery§! earned by other faction members within the theater to their own country, based on their §HAttack§! and §HDefense§! skills.
They also reduce §HSupply Consumption§! based on their §HLogistics§! and §HPlanning§! skills.

CREATE_FACTION_NO_DLC_DESC.value: Create the foundation of a military alliance. Invite other countries to strengthen the faction. Faction members can support each other in war!

faction_goal_unlock_research_desc.value: The development of superior advanced technology is not an idle pasttime, but a race against those who would use it to destroy us. Pooling our resources is the only way to ensure our advantage remains competitive.

faction_goal_unlock_military_desc.value: Being able to respond to developing situations with well-structured, joint task forces will become vital as our alliances deepen. We should begin planning for this eventuality immediately.

FACTION_THEATER_SUPPLY_BONUS_TOOLTIP.value: Selected countries in a theater receive $VAL$ §HSupply Consumption§! based on the commander's $SKILL1|H$ ($SKILL1VAL|H$) and $SKILL2|H$ ($SKILL2VAL|H$) skills.\n\nAn §HAdmiral§! will convery a higher bonus to naval supply consumption, whereas a §HField Marshal§! will convey a better bonus to land supply consumption.

FACTION_THEATER_MASTERY_GAIN_TOOLTIP.value: The commander's country receives $VAL|.1G%$ of the £doctrine_mastery §HMastery§! earned by other faction members in the theater, based on the commander's $SKILL1|H$ ($SKILL1VAL|H$) and $SKILL2|H$ ($SKILL2VAL|H$) skills.

FACTION_RULES_TAB_TT.value: §HFaction Rules§!\nView and change the rules that your Faction must abide by.

FACTION_RESEARCH_TAB_TT.value: §HFaction Research§!\nSet up research sharing and joint research facilities.

FACTION_ARMY_TAB_TT.value: §HFaction Military Operations§!\nRequest garrison manpower, manage theater commanders and faction theaters, and set up doctrine sharing.

FACTION_INTELLIGENCE_TAB_TT.value: §HFaction Intelligence§!\nSet up intelligence sharing and change faction spymaster.

FACTION_POWER_RANKING_TOOLTIP.value: §HFaction Ranking§!\n\nBased on our §HFaction Power Projection§! of $VAL|0H$, our faction is ranked $RANK|H$ in the world.

POWER_PROJECTION_BLURB.value: \n§gFaction Power Projection affects how likely countries are to accept faction invitations, and acts as a tie-breaker during Peace Conferences.§!

THEATER_COMMANDER_SUPPLY_SKILL_DESC.value: This commander reduces the supply consumption by $VAL|H$ due to their planning & logistic skills

FACTION_THEATER_POPUP_DESC.value: Are you sure you want to spend £faction_initiative_texticon£ $COST|0H$ on creating a new faction theater?

FACTION_THEATER_SHOW_PIN_TOOLTIP.value: Toggle showing §HFaction Theaters§! in §HDefault§!, §HStrategic Navy§! and §HStrategic Air§! map modes.

FACTION_EXECUTE_CAREFUL_DESC.value: When the plan is carried out, units will not attack heavily fortified locations unless they are unmanned, and will avoid attacking provinces which will weaken the front line by making it longer.\n\n§gNote that this will only affect allied AI controlled units within the theater, not any player controlled units.§!

FACTION_EXECUTE_BALANCED_DESC.value: The standard rules for carrying out battle plans are in effect. Units will attempt to advance in a manner that keeps the front line as short as possible and may attack fortified locations.\n\n§gNote that this will only affect allied AI controlled units within the theater, not any player controlled units.§!

FACTION_EXECUTE_RUSH_DESC.value: Units will attack provinces if they are a part of the plan, even if it may mean that the front line becomes longer or may put units in exposed locations.\n\n§gNote that this will only affect allied AI controlled units within the theater, not any player controlled units.§!

GARRISON_SUPPORT_SEND.value: Requested manpower will be delivered directly to our garrisons in territory we occupy.

liberalism_desc.value: A democratic ideology focused on civil rights and reform.
